creator: ncrogers@gmail.com
text: I ran into this same problem myself today on a 10G ixgbe(4) interface running 10.1-RELEASE... Did anyone manage to get a working patch going? Looks like activity towards a resolution has died off. Even though ALTQ is unlikely to support speeds higher than 4Gb/s on most hardware, it would be nice to know that we can configure a 10G link speed. Currently if you set an interface altq to 10G it confusingly becomes around 1.4Gb without warning due to the 32bit unsigned integer.
